creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
I do have debug symbols turned off in kernel. In order to keep my kernel as small as possible, things I don't use in kernel are commented out. I also build ports with options changed.

So possible solutions:
- I have to enable debug symbols in kernel, or
- DTRACE should be disabled in www/node by default.

But the second solution isn't my decision of course :-).
So I'm going to mark this as solved since it's clear what caused the error.

Thanks!
